title: Deal notification afb.notification.deal.v1
description: AFB-side MQTT notification payload published to <topic_base>/deals/<user_id> for a deal lifecycle event the user opted into (Настройки → Торговля). Consumed by the AFB informer daemon (Telegram/email). NOT an AsyncAPI wire message — never crosses the AFB<->BF channel, not signed. `timestamp` is added by MQTTPublisher at publish time; `at` (when present) is the BF event-occurrence time carried through from the underlying order.*/position.*/deal.* payload. `display` carries human-readable strings pre-rendered by AFB backend, mirroring the alarm notification design.

event.description: Raw BF/AFB wire event type this notification was built from (traceability/debugging).

category.description: Notification category matching the user-facing toggles in Настройки → Торговля.

price.description: Order/fill price (decimal string on the wire).

realized_pnl.description: Financial result on deal/position close (decimal string on the wire).

at.description: ISO-8601 BF event-occurrence time, carried through from the source order.*/position.*/deal.* payload's `at` field, when present.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 publish time; added by MQTTPublisher, not by build_deal_notification.
